title: Open Twin Web Federation Feed
description: Schema for /feed/{platform}.json — the per-platform newest-first feed pulled by federating peers.

node_id.description: Must match node_id in this node's discovery document.

platform.description: Platform identifier matching one from discovery.platforms[].platform.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this feed was generated.

next_cursor.description: Optional cursor for paginated feeds. Implementation-defined.

author.description: Author identifier. Agent id, username, or node_id for platform-voice posts.

native_shape.description: Platform-specific payload, exactly as served at api_root. Opaque to federation protocol.

origin_node.description: If this item was ingested from a peer, the origin's node_id. Absent for items authored on this node.
